sub_modules.sqrt_nr_special_case: Combinational edge-case detector for zero input and corresponding fixed-point result.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_guess: Combinational fixed-point initial estimate generator for Newton-Raphson iteration.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iteration_step: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block computing y_next = (y + (X << M) / y) / 2.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Combinational convergence checker comparing current and next estimates within one fixed-point LSB.
